Question: How much higher, expressed as a percentage of the Donana Marsh site's surface CO2 efflux, is the CO2 emission at the Donana-Marsh-10 lagoonal reedbed research node (ombrotrophic raised bog plateau with hummock-hollow microtopography; Typha angustifolia emergent belt with helophyte understory; continuous diel tidal exchange producing salinity oscillations) compared to the Okefenokee-GRT-01 ground respiration tower (lacustrine fringe marsh with fetch-limited littoral zone; sphagnum cuspidatum lawn overlain by ericaceous microshrubs; high-frequency overwash connectivity associated with storm surge breaching)?
SQL Query: SELECT ((SELECT SurfaceCO2Efflux FROM WetlandBiogeochemicalInventory WHERE RecordKey = "Donana-Marsh-10 lagoonal reedbed research node" AND EcoHydroFacet = "ombrotrophic raised bog plateau with hummock-hollow microtopography" AND VegetationStratum = "Typha angustifolia emergent belt with helophyte understory" AND HydraulicExchangeIndex = "continuous diel tidal exchange producing salinity oscillations") - (SELECT SurfaceCO2Efflux FROM WetlandBiogeochemicalInventory WHERE RecordKey = "Okefenokee-GRT-01 ground respiration tower" AND EcoHydroFacet = "lacustrine fringe marsh with fetch-limited littoral zone" AND VegetationStratum = "sphagnum cuspidatum lawn overlain by ericaceous microshrubs" AND HydraulicExchangeIndex = "high-frequency overwash connectivity associated with storm surge breaching")) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SurfaceCO2Efflux FROM WetlandBiogeochemicalInventory WHERE RecordKey = "Donana-Marsh-10 lagoonal reedbed research node" AND EcoHydroFacet = "ombrotrophic raised bog plateau with hummock-hollow microtopography" AND VegetationStratum = "Typha angustifolia emergent belt with helophyte understory" AND HydraulicExchangeIndex = "continuous diel tidal exchange producing salinity oscillations"), 0) AS SurfaceCO2Efflux;

Question: What was the percentage difference in methane release measured in fluvial floodplain suspended sediment depositional microhabitats between the long-term alpine fen subplot (ALP-FEN-023) during the late-season autumn 2021 monitoring and the urban infiltration trench (URB-INF-009) during the tidal intrusion 2020 campaign, expressed as a percentage of the alpine fen value?

Question: What is the difference between the methane release rate observed in the recolonising intertidal mudflat with diatom biofilm at the Sundarbans tidal inlet during the Summer 2016 peak thermal regime and the rate recorded in the peat-accumulating sedge-dominated fen with anoxic rhizosphere at the Everglades short-hydroperiod site during the Summer 2023 multi-site campaign, expressed as a percentage of the Sundarbans Summer 2016 emission?

Both samples are from collapse-scar peat patches formed after permafrost thaw with high water content and have a paleoaccumulation descriptor of transgressive depocentre accumulation with increased decomposition gradients.

Question: By what percentage does the annual carbon accretion rate at the mine-impacted peatland (PT-TAI-033; mixed-pathway transitional methanogenesis with seasonal shifts in a denitrifying-suboxic lateral flowpath microzone) exceed the rate at the industrial-proximal site (PT-FEN-017; acetoclastic-dominant methanogenesis in a manganous-dominated redox front), expressed as a percentage of the mine-impacted site's rate?

Question: What is the difference between the anaerobic bubble-mediated carbon flux (pre-industrial proxy, PC-Delta-099 tidal saltmarsh, Spartina-dominated with tidal creek networks) and the diffusive molecular carbon flux (restoration pulse 2015–2016 immediate post-restoration, PC-Polder-221 embanked meadow with polygonal permafrost features), expressed as a percentage of the pre-industrial anaerobic bubble-mediated carbon flux?
SQL Query: SELECT ((SELECT CarbonFluxMagnitude FROM PeatlandFluxLedger WHERE ParcelChronicle = "PC-Delta-099 restored sediment deposition plot after managed realignment" AND FluxProcess = "anaerobic bubble-mediated release (episodic ebullition from shallow peat)" AND BiomeStratum = "tidal saltmarsh spartina-dominated sward with tidal creek networks" AND EpochSlice = "pre-industrial proxy segment reconstructed from dendrochronology and peat cores") - (SELECT CarbonFluxMagnitude FROM PeatlandFluxLedger WHERE ParcelChronicle = "PC-Polder-221 embanked meadow cohort converted from tidal marsh" AND FluxProcess = "diffusive molecular flux across water column and oxic boundary layer" AND BiomeStratum = "peat plateau with polygonal frost-scar features and permafrost relics" AND EpochSlice = "restoration pulse 2015-2016 immediate post-restoration implementation epoch")) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT CarbonFluxMagnitude FROM PeatlandFluxLedger WHERE ParcelChronicle = "PC-Delta-099 restored sediment deposition plot after managed realignment" AND FluxProcess = "anaerobic bubble-mediated release (episodic ebullition from shallow peat)" AND BiomeStratum = "tidal saltmarsh spartina-dominated sward with tidal creek networks" AND EpochSlice = "pre-industrial proxy segment reconstructed from dendrochronology and peat cores"), 0) AS CarbonFluxMagnitude;

Question: By what percentage does the buried carbon stock at the Moreton Bay seagrass bank in Australia (oligohaline Spartina alterniflora marsh mosaic with tidal creeks; anoxic silty organo-mud with fine lamination; measured by paired coring and radiocarbon AMS age-model triangulation) differ from the buried carbon stock at the Camargue brackish reedbed in France (tidal flat microtopographic hummock-hollow complex; rhizome-bound cohesive peat with detrital woody fragments; measured by hyperspectral remote sensing), expressed relative to the Moreton Bay value (i.e., (Moreton − Camargue) / Moreton × 100)?
SQL Query: SELECT ((SELECT BuriedCarbonStock FROM BlueCarbonReservoirMatrix WHERE ReservoirTag = "Moreton Bay seagrass bank - Australia" AND BiotopeComplexity = "oligohaline Spartina alterniflora marsh mosaic with tidal creeks" AND DominantSedimentFacies = "anoxic silty organo-mud with fine lamination" AND MeasurementProtocol = "paired coring and radiocarbon AMS age-model triangulation") - (SELECT BuriedCarbonStock FROM BlueCarbonReservoirMatrix WHERE ReservoirTag = "Camargue brackish reedbed - France" AND BiotopeComplexity = "tidal flat microtopographic hummock-hollow complex" AND DominantSedimentFacies = "rhizome-bound cohesive peat with detrital woody fragments" AND MeasurementProtocol = "hyperspectral remote sensing for seagrass canopy cover mapping")) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT BuriedCarbonStock FROM BlueCarbonReservoirMatrix WHERE ReservoirTag = "Moreton Bay seagrass bank - Australia" AND BiotopeComplexity = "oligohaline Spartina alterniflora marsh mosaic with tidal creeks" AND DominantSedimentFacies = "anoxic silty organo-mud with fine lamination" AND MeasurementProtocol = "paired coring and radiocarbon AMS age-model triangulation"), 0) AS BuriedCarbonStock;

Question: What is the percentage difference relative to the peri-urban site (i.e., (peri-urban − salt‑affected fen) / peri‑urban × 100) in soil carbon venting flux between the peri-urban rewetted peat site (ECM-URBAN-FR-11, with anthropogenically altered litterfall composition with invasive leaf input and an aerobic acrotelm actively oxidizing microprofile) and the salt-influenced fen site (ECM-COAST-IE-06, with interannual mast-driven deposition following a mast year and a waterlogged humic gley with persistent reducing microzones)?
SQL Query: SELECT ((SELECT SoilCarbonVentFlux FROM PeatlandEddyFluxRegister WHERE EddyCovTowerID = "ECM-URBAN-FR-11 (peri-urban rewetted peat block monitoring mast)" AND LitterfallPhenophase = "anthropogenically altered litterfall composition with invasive leaf input" AND SubstrateOxidationClass = "aerobic acrotelm actively oxidizing microprofile") - (SELECT SoilCarbonVentFlux FROM PeatlandEddyFluxRegister WHERE EddyCovTowerID = "ECM-COAST-IE-06 (salt-influenced fen, saline intrusion sensor node)" AND LitterfallPhenophase = "interannual mast-driven deposition following mast year" AND SubstrateOxidationClass = "waterlogged humic gley with persistent reducing microzones")) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SoilCarbonVentFlux FROM PeatlandEddyFluxRegister WHERE EddyCovTowerID = "ECM-URBAN-FR-11 (peri-urban rewetted peat block monitoring mast)" AND LitterfallPhenophase = "anthropogenically altered litterfall composition with invasive leaf input" AND SubstrateOxidationClass = "aerobic acrotelm actively oxidizing microprofile"), 0) AS SoilCarbonVentFlux;
